overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a cloaked character traversing a dark torch-lit stone corridor, ascending a stairwell, and emerging into a vast foggy exterior revealing the massive gothic Shadow Keep cathedral. The atmosphere transitions from dim interior lighting to a misty, desaturated exterior with dramatic environmental scale.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark stone corridor with torch lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the torch-lit corridor toward the distant archway

entered.detail: repeating stone archway ceiling receding into the distance
rough-hewn stone wall with vertical texture
rough-hewn stone wall with vertical texture
warm orange torches mounted on the walls providing dim illumination
faint light visible at the far end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit stone corridor with repeating arches overhead. Wall-mounted torches cast warm orange light against the rough stone walls as the character moves steadily toward a distant exit.

events.description: ambient light increases significantly as the bright exit archway approaches

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs toward the bright exit, passing debris and broken scaffolding

entered.detail: wide stone stairs ascending toward the exit
piles of broken stone and debris accumulated along the stair walls
collapsed wooden poles and beams leaning against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone stairwell flanked by rubble and broken wooden scaffolding. The environment transitions from the flat corridor to an incline, with increasing brightness ahead indicating the approaching exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty cathedral courtyard with gothic spires

events.description: exits dark interior through archway into vast foggy exterior revealing massive gothic cathedral
atmospheric lighting shifts from gray-blue fog to reddish-brown dusty mist

agents.ego_description: emerging from the archway and pausing to survey the massive cathedral and surrounding spires

entered.detail: towering gothic cathedral with intricate stonework and tall spires rising into the fog
numerous pointed stone spires arranged in rows across the courtyard
overcast foggy sky with low visibility creating atmospheric depth

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark archway into a vast, foggy exterior revealing the monumental Shadow Keep cathedral. The camera pans across a field of stone spires as the atmosphere shifts from gray mist to a reddish, dust-filled haze, emphasizing the scale of the gothic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a torch-lit interior into the overwhelming scale of a gothic exterior. It begins with a steady walk through a narrow stone corridor where repeating arches and wall-mounted torches cast a warm orange glow against the rough walls. As the character moves forward, the path shifts into an ascent up a wide stone stairwell flanked by rubble and broken scaffolding, with the lighting gradually brightening toward a distant exit. The scene then opens as the character emerges from the dark archway into a vast, foggy landscape dominated by the monumental Shadow Keep cathedral. Finally, the camera pans across a field of stone spires while the atmosphere transforms from a gray mist into a reddish, dust-filled haze.
